title: astragalus heterophyllus
intro: Astragalus heterophyllus, also known as milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its adaptogenic properties and ability to boost the immune system. The medicinal properties of Astragalus heterophyllus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to provide various health benefits such as reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting lung function. Astragalus heterophyllus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its effects.
